omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, sale, or transfer of assets, your personal data may be shared or transferred to the acquiring entity or third parties involved in the transaction. If such a change occurs, we will notify you of the new ownership and any changes to the way your data is handled, as described in this Privacy Policy.

If such a change occurs, we will notify you of the new ownership and any changes to the way your data is handled, as described in this Privacy Policy.
